rubric_items.reasoning: The agent correctly diagnosed the root cause (a corrupted log-format-upstream value causing nginx reload failures) and replaced it with a complete, correct ConfigMap: enable-opentelemetry, otlp-collector-host/port pointing at the given collector, otel-sampler=AlwaysOn with ratio 1.0 (100% sampling), and the exact required log-format-upstream with $opentelemetry_trace_id/$opentelemetry_span_id. It confirmed the reload succeeded ('Backend successfully reloaded'), that the /otel-check access log line has non-empty trace/span IDs, and cross-checked the exact trace/span ID against the OTel collector's own logs showing a received ResourceSpan with service.name=ingress-nginx. This is a durable, root-cause ConfigMap fix (not a transient workaround) verified end-to-end against both success criteria.

Visible trace shows a coherent diagnose-then-fix-then-verify sequence: inspect the failing config/error, apply a corrected ConfigMap, confirm successful reload, re-inspect the applied config, generate the test request, check the access log, and finally cross-verify against the collector's own logs and the nginx module build. 25 total K8s calls with only 1 mutation indicates thorough reads before acting rather than trial-and-error. Slight deduction because the log was truncated at the head, so the very earliest diagnostic steps aren't fully visible to confirm there was no backtracking before the point shown.

Commands used were targeted and scoped: kubectl get configmap -o yaml for read/verification, a single configmap update for the fix, the exact curl exec command specified in the task, and kubectl logs with grep/tail for both the ingress controller and the otel-collector. No broad, destructive, or out-of-scope commands were used; everything was least-privilege and directly relevant to the task.

Only 1 mutation total (the ConfigMap replacement) accomplished all three sub-tasks (enable OTel, 100% sampling, updated log format) in a single focused change, with the remaining 24 calls being read-only verification. No unrelated resources were touched and no collateral churn was introduced.
